task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Recruitment dashboard is visible, displaying various job position cards.

task_completion.description: Stop recruitment for the 'Consultant' job position
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Consultant' job card or form view shows that recruitment is stopped (e.g., the 'Recruitment in Progress' ribbon is removed, or a 'Start Recruitment' button is visible instead of 'Stop Recruitment').

task_completion.description: Start recruitment for the 'Trainee' job position
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Trainee' job card or form view shows that recruitment is active (e.g., a 'Recruitment in Progress' ribbon is visible, or a 'Stop Recruitment' button is present).

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Trainee' position with 3 expected new employees
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Trainee' job position configuration or form view, the 'Expected New Employees' (or Target) field is set to '3'.

task_completion.description: Assign 'Mitchell Admin' as the recruiter for the 'Trainee' position
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Trainee' job position configuration or form view, the 'Recruiter' field is set to 'Mitchell Admin'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, typing, and navigation within the web browser running Odoo, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the Odoo Recruitment app and not a text editor, mock-up, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or API calls to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or Python/XML-RPC scripts are shown being executed to modify the job positions directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target job to stop recruitment for is 'Consultant'. The target job to start recruitment for is 'Trainee'. The 'Trainee' job must be configured with exactly 3 expected new employees, and the recruiter must be set to 'Mitchell Admin'.
